title: Best Offer Under Twenty
objective: Survive a rapid line of sellers by replaying their pulse sequences, then adjusting for surprise bargaining twists so every accepted offer stays at or under $20 while your combo climbs.

controls.input: Tap the four offer pads in order with one thumb or two thumbs
controls.outcome: Matches the seller's demand rhythm and keeps the negotiation alive

controls.input: Tap and hold a glowing beat pad instead of tapping it normally
controls.outcome: Converts that beat into a lower-value counterbeat when the round demands a cheaper best offer

controls.input: Tap the DEAL stamp after a perfect sequence
controls.outcome: Banks the current multiplier before the next seller speeds up

steps: A seller enters and flashes a short demand sequence across four offer pads: Cash, Card, Trade, and Pass.
The game plays the pattern with punchy bass clicks and register sounds, then briefly shows the total asking price.
You replay the sequence from memory before the timer ring closes.
Every few rounds, one rule twist appears for that seller, such as 'Best Only' where one marked beat must be held to downgrade it, or 'No Pat
h Back' where the final two beats must be reversed.
If your replay satisfies the active rule and keeps the offer at $20 or less, the seller accepts and your combo increases.
A wrong beat, a missed hold, going over $20, or timing out ends the run immediately.
scoring: Each accepted seller is worth points based on sequence length, playback speed, and current combo multiplier. Perfect replays add a 'Best Offer' multiplier that grows until you bank it with DEAL. Unbanked multipliers are
tips: Listen before you look; each pad has a distinct sound cue.
Hold beats only when they glow gold; unnecessary holds count as mistakes.
Bank big combos before a high-speed seller if your multiplier is at risk.
Watch the price pips under the pads so you do not accidentally push the offer above $20.
